TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Al-Farouq_Aminu, title = Al-Farouq_Aminu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Farouq_Aminu} }

S.FORM: == Al-Farouq Aminu == siwkay niza Al-Farouq Aminu (9 a bulad 21 a demiad, 1991 a mihcan nalecuhan), tatama, lumeniay a tademaw. miunduay, u kanas-mali a mimaliay nu Amilika NBA. namakay Nayciliya a kanatal, micumud tu ku Amilika kanatal-mueneng. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika 艾爾-法魯克·阿米努(英語:Al-Farouq Aminu,1990年9月21日－),為美國NBA .他在2010年的NBA . Al-Farouq Ajiede Aminu (born September 21, 1990) is a Nigerian-American professional basketball player for the Portland Trail Blazers of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He plays internationally with the Nigeria national basketball team. Aminu was selected by the Los Angeles Clippers in the 2010 NBA draft with the eighth overall pick. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == ar~ɾ-farou* aminu == siwkaj niza ar~ɾ-farou* aminu (* a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan nar~ɾəʦuħan), tatama, r~ɾuməniaj a tadəmaw. miunduaj, u kanas-mar~ɾi a mimar~ɾiaj nu amir~ɾika nba. namakaj najʦir~ɾija a kanatar~ɾ, miʦumud tu ku amir~ɾika kanatar~ɾ-muənəŋ. u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika **-*******(**:ar~ɾ-farou* aminu,***********),***nba .********nba . ar~ɾ-farou* ajiədə aminu (born səptəmbər **, ****) is a nigərian-aməriʦan profəssionar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ pr~ɾajər for tħə portr~ɾand trair~ɾ br~ɾazərs of tħə nationar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ assoʦiation (nba). ħə pr~ɾajs intərnationar~ɾr~ɾj witħ tħə nigəria nationar~ɾ baskətbar~ɾr~ɾ təam. aminu was sər~ɾəʦtəd bj tħə r~ɾos aŋər~ɾəs ʦr~ɾippərs in tħə **** nba draft witħ tħə əigħtħ o*ərar~ɾr~ɾ piʦk. kakuniza kar~ɾunasur~ɾitan-sur~ɾu
S.FORM: == Al-Farouq Aminu == siwkay niza Al-Farouq Aminu (9 a bulad 21 a demiad, 1991 a mihcan nalecuhan), tatama, lumeniay a tademaw. miunduay, u kanas-mali a mimaliay nu Amilika NBA. namakay Nayciliya a kanatal, micumud tu ku Amilika kanatal-mueneng. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika 艾爾-法魯克·阿米努(英語:Al-Farouq Aminu,1990年9月21日－),為美國NBA .他在2010年的NBA . Al-Farouq Ajiede Aminu (born September 21, 1990) is a Nigerian-American professional basketball player for the Portland Trail Blazers of the National Basketball Association (NBA). He plays internationally with the Nigeria national basketball team. Aminu was selected by the Los Angeles Clippers in the 2010 NBA draft with the eighth overall pick. kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu
